backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DroneWash Dashboard defining all core data types (Job, Expense, Quote, Invoice, Fund, etc.) and persistent state with migration support for a drone washing business management system.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines the old actor state shape and provides a `run` function to migrate existing persistent data to the current schema version.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features related to fixing the Maintenance Fund balance data source and React Query cache key synchronization between Dashboard and MaintenanceManagement components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes made to each component, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the DroneWash QuotePro Admin Dashboard React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles Internet Identity authentication, profile setup, data migration, and lazy-loads the Dashboard, with a QueryClient and ThemeProvider wrapping the app.
frontend/src/components/AddFundTransacti: Modal dialog component for adding inflow or outflow transactions to a specific fund, with form fields for amount, type, category, and description using the `useAddFundTransaction` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddGoalDialog.ts: A dialog component for adding a new financial/business goal with fields for description, target metrics, target value, target date, milestones, month, and year. Submits via the `useAddGoal` mutation hook and encodes extra fields into the description string.
frontend/src/components/AddInvestmentTra: A dialog component for recording an investment fund transaction (inflow or outflow) with amount, allocation type, and description fields. Submits via the `useAddInvestmentTransaction` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddMaintenanceEx: A dialog component for logging a maintenance expense with amount, equipment type, part category, purpose, and receipt URL fields. Submits via the `useAddMaintenanceExpense` mutation hook, encoding extra fields into an `additionalInfo` string.
frontend/src/components/AddMaintenanceIn: A dialog component for manually adding funds to the maintenance fund balance, accepting an amount and description. Submits via the `useAddMaintenanceFundInflow` mutation hook with a loading spinner during submission.
Renders two memoized charts—a bar chart comparing monthly revenue vs. expenses and a line chart showing profit projections—using data fetched from three query hooks. Includes error-state refresh buttons for each chart.
frontend/src/components/ArchivedInvestme: A static informational component that notifies users that the old archived investments feature has been replaced by a new Investment Fund system, listing its key features and providing a navigation button to the Investment Fund tab.
frontend/src/components/BackupVersionsDi: A dialog component that lists saved backup versions with options to download each as a JSON file or delete them, displaying timestamp, ID, size, and record count.
frontend/src/components/COGSSettings.tsx: A settings form component for configuring Cost of Goods Sold parameters (van fuel rates by city, generator fuel rate, additional pilot fee, chemicals cost) with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/components/ContractsManagem: A full CRUD management component for client contracts, supporting create/edit/delete dialogs, search/filter by status, and displaying contracts in a table using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/CreateFundDialog: A dialog form for creating a new financial fund with fields for name, type, spending limit, and approval threshold, submitting via a React Query mutation.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForms.t: A component providing forms to add jobs and expenses, and tables listing existing records with edit and delete actions backed by React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/DataMigrationHan: Handles migration of legacy localStorage data (jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, goals) to the backend by reading, transforming, and submitting each record via React Query mutation hooks, with progress tracking and status display.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: A reusable alert dialog component that prompts the user to confirm a delete action, showing a title, description, and Cancel/Delete buttons with an optional loading state.
frontend/src/components/EditExpenseDialo: A modal dialog for editing an existing expense record, pre-populating fields for amount, date, category, and additional info, and submitting updates via the useUpdateExpense hook.
frontend/src/components/EditFundDialog.t: A modal dialog for editing a fund's name, spending limit, and approval threshold, submitting changes via the useUpdateFund mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/EditJobDialog.ts: A modal dialog for editing an existing job record's client name, revenue, date, and sector, submitting updates via the useUpdateJob hook.
frontend/src/components/ErrorPanel.tsx: A card-based error display component that shows a destructive alert with an error message and an optional retry button.
frontend/src/components/ExpensesManageme: A full expenses management UI featuring a filterable, searchable table of expenses with bulk and single delete support, category filtering, and a summary of total expenses.
frontend/src/components/FinancialMetrics: Displays a dashboard of financial metric cards (maintenance, main, salaries, investment fund balances) with expandable details, using data from multiple backend queries. Supports admin actions like editing funds and adding transactions via dialogs.
Renders a tabbed management UI for all funds, showing overview cards, transaction history, and transfers, with admin controls to create, edit, delete funds and add transactions. Also surfaces active fund alerts in a warning banner.
frontend/src/components/InvestmentFundMa: Shows the investment fund's current balance, total inflows/outflows, and a transaction history table. Admins can add new investment transactions via a dialog.
Provides a form to create an invoice by selecting an existing quote and entering customer details, then saves it to the backend and auto-generates a downloadable PDF.
frontend/src/components/InvoicesList.tsx: Lists all invoices with search and status filtering, supporting PDF download, status toggle (Paid/Pending), and deletion with a confirmation dialog. Admin-only actions are conditionally rendered.
frontend/src/components/JobCalendar.tsx: Renders a monthly calendar view of jobs, allowing navigation between months and clicking on a day to open a JobDetailsDialog for jobs scheduled on that date.
frontend/src/components/JobDetailsDialog: A dialog for viewing and editing job details (customer info, financial fields), restricted to admin users, with form submission handled via the useUpdateJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/KPIWidgets.tsx: Displays four KPI cards (net profit trend, job completion rate, VAT due, and fund balance delta) derived from financial metrics, jobs, and invoices data.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: A simple reusable card component that shows a spinning loader and an optional message while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceManag: Manages the maintenance fund by displaying balance, total collected, and total spent cards alongside a transaction history table, with admin controls to add expenses, add inflows, and reset the fund.
frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx: A slide-out sheet navigation menu for mobile viewports that lists all app tabs as buttons and conditionally includes a Settings tab for admins.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyReports.t: Renders a monthly report view with month/year selectors, summary metrics, goals tracking, and CSV export functionality, with an option for admins to add new goals.
frontend/src/components/PricingManagemen: Admin component for viewing and editing service rate tiers (per m²) across five cleaning service types, fetching rates via React Query and saving updates through a batch mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: Modal dialog that collects a new user's name, email, and role (Admin or Viewer) on first launch and passes the data to a parent-provided onSave callback.
Multi-step quote builder that lets users select services, enter areas, apply add-ons and volume discounts, calculate COGS breakdowns, and save the resulting quote via a React Query mutation.
frontend/src/components/QuotesList.tsx: Paginated, filterable table of all saved quotes with search, sector/service filters, expandable row details, and buttons to export customer-facing or internal PDFs and delete quotes.
frontend/src/components/ReportingSection: Reporting dashboard that aggregates job revenue and expenses to display unit-economics metrics and provides buttons to export cash-flow and unit-economics data as CSV or PDF.
frontend/src/components/UserPreferencesD: Settings dialog allowing users to toggle dark mode, choose a dashboard layout, and configure metric filters, persisting preferences on-chain via a React Query mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and local TypeScript interfaces for all backend data operations (jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, funds, etc.), along with localStorage helpers for backup versioning.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates customer-facing quote PDFs by opening a new browser window with styled HTML content and triggering the print dialog.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Generates cash flow reports from jobs and expenses in both CSV (downloaded as a file) and PDF (printed via a new browser window) formats with running balance calculations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page component that renders a tabbed interface with lazy-loaded sections (financials, jobs, quotes, invoices, analytics, etc.) and handles backup creation, user profile display, and role-based access control.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that authenticates users via Internet Identity, displaying a branded card UI with a login button and loading state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback for persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors via oklch variables, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration that loads ICP canister IDs from JSON files, injects them as environment variables, sets up a React plugin, path aliases, and a dev-server proxy to the local DFX replica.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, known issues (Maintenance Fund balance desync between Dashboard and MaintenanceManagement), existing fix features, and a pending audit task for the backend Motoko actor.
